name: Nordland (Norway)
description: A square gold field charged with a black heraldic device.
history: Nordland's flag is the heraldic banner of its county coat of arms. Nordland survived the 2020 county reorganisation and continues unchanged.

features.symbolism: heraldic banner of the county arms: a stylised black design on a gold field, evoking the long, narrow coastal county of Nordland with its characteristic mountains and fishing heritage
the central heraldic figure characteristic of Nordland's county arms
